title: P0: Graph Structural Health — Orphan Reduction, Challenge Culture, Deduplication
description: Agents are writing nodes but not connecting them. 50 orphans, 0.02 challenge ratio, duplicate nodes. The graph captures observations but not the adversarial synthesis OHM was designed for. This is the parent for 9 child issues covering: orphan detection, challenge culture, source reliability, dedup, synthesis writing, /listen fix, /suggest detail, /neighborhood fix, and embedding backfill.

title: Orphan Detection and Auto-Connect Pipeline
description: 50 orphan nodes with zero edges — portfolio/finance cluster, market events, etc. Knowledge goes in but doesn't connect, so it can't be traversed or synthesized.
design: Orphans are a smell, not a bug. Fix isn't auto-connecting — it's making orphans visible to agents who can fix them. Expose orphan count, surface in heartbeat prompts.
acceptance_criteria: /orphans flags dead-end sinks and root sources, not just zero-edge nodes. Orphan count in /stats. Agent heartbeat prompt includes orphan count. /suggest returns orphan connection suggestions.

title: Challenge Edge Culture — Breaking the 0.02 Ratio
description: 146 edges, only 3 CHALLENGED_BY. Challenge ratio 0.02. OHM's core design is 'challenge, don't overwrite' but nobody challenges. Graph is a shared notepad, not adversarial.
design: Low challenge rate is agent behavior gap, not code bug. Two fixes: (1) make challenges easy and prompted (SDK + heartbeat), (2) make absence of challenges visible (stats, listen, dashboards). Nudge architecture.
acceptance_criteria: Agent heartbeat prompt: 'N recent observations have no challenges. Review and challenge if warranted.' /listen surfaces unchallenged observations. SDK challenge() validates challenger != node creator. Challenge edges visually distinct in /hubs.

title: Source Reliability Endpoint Missing (404)
description: AGENTS.md documents /source_reliability and record_outcome() as key features. HTTP daemon returns 404. SDK method likely exists but routes to missing endpoint. Agents can't track whether Clio's claims are more accurate than Deepthought's. Merges/closes OHM-7e4.
design: Already tracked as OHM-7e4 (P1). Elevating to P0 because entire trust layer depends on it. Without source reliability, agents have no reason to weight one observation over another — graph is flat.
acceptance_criteria: GET /source_reliability?agent=agent-clio returns {p_accurate, total_outcomes, recent_trend}. POST /record_outcome with {source_agent, claim_node, outcome: bool}. Both endpoints functional and tested. SDK routes to working HTTP endpoints.

title: Duplicate Node Detection and Merge
description: /suggest found 'Fed Rate Hike Signal' as both concept-fed-hike-signal and concept-fed-hike-signal-may-2026. Two nodes, same concept, no edges. Agents creating slightly different IDs for the same thing.
design: Dedup is hard in general. Start with exact/substring label matching + shared tags. /merge is the key tool — agents can't avoid creating duplicates, but need a way to fix them.
acceptance_criteria: POST /merge: merge source into target (edges re-routed, observations combined, source soft-deleted). On create_node, warn if similar label/tags exist. /admin/dedup scan returns candidate duplicate pairs with similarity score.

title: Agent Synthesis Writing — L3 Edges Not Just Observations
description: Agents write observations (44 total) but rarely write L3 synthesis edges. Deep analysis lives in conversation and MEMORY.md, not in OHM. The graph doesn't know what agents actually think. 147 L3 edges exist but most are structural, not interpretive.
design: Observations are data. Synthesis edges are thinking. Current API forces 3 calls for one thought (create node, create edges, add observation). Synthesis endpoint collapses into one call. Reduce friction, increase thinking.
acceptance_criteria: /agent/synthesis endpoint: POST {agent, cluster_node_ids, synthesis_content, confidence} creates concept + L3 edges + observation in one call. SDK write_synthesis() method. Heartbeat prompt: 'N clusters of 3+ nodes without synthesis. Write one.'

title: /listen Endpoint Broken or Empty
description: /listen returns empty results with valid since parameter. Agents can't discover what other agents wrote recently. Breaks adversarial loop — you can't challenge what you can't see.
design: May be query bug (wrong column, timestamp format) or observations not stored with correct timestamps. Either way, /listen is essential for cross-agent awareness. Without it, agents write into a void.
acceptance_criteria: GET /listen?since=2026-05-20T00:00:00 returns observations after that timestamp. Works with actor and layer filters. Returns non-empty when observations exist in window. Test: write observation, call /listen, verify it appears.

title: /suggest Output Missing Node Details
description: /suggest?method=shared_tags returns 20 suggestions but reason field just says 'Shared N tags' without listing which tags. Agents can't evaluate whether a suggestion is valid without knowing why it was suggested.
design: /suggest is the most valuable endpoint for agent-driven graph maintenance. Currently doing computation but hiding evidence. Surface matching tags so agents can make informed decisions.
acceptance_criteria: /suggest response includes shared_tags array listing actual matching tags. /suggest?method=orphans returns orphan connection suggestions. /suggest?method=hubs returns hub diversity suggestions. Each suggestion includes score and human-readable reason.

title: /neighborhood Endpoint Not Working
description: GET /neighborhood?node_id=hormuz_and_gate&depth=2 returns empty nodes/edges despite this being the most observed node (9 observations). Neighborhood traversal is the core query for understanding context around a concept.
design: May be parameter naming issue (API expects id not node_id) or recursive CTE bug. If neighborhood queries return empty, the graph is write-only — most fundamental query is broken.
acceptance_criteria: /neighborhood returns connected nodes/edges within specified depth. Works with both node_id param and path-based /neighborhood/{node_id}. Returns non-empty for nodes with edges. Test: query hormuz_and_gate, verify results.

title: Embedding Backfill Still Not Run
description: Semantic search returns empty because no embeddings generated. /admin/embeddings endpoint exists for batch backfill but hasn't been executed. /semantic_search and /suggest?method=semantic are dead endpoints without vectors.
design: Known gap in Known Issues. Fix is running backfill + adding auto-embed on create. Low effort, high impact — semantic search transforms graph from traversable to discoverable.
acceptance_criteria: /admin/embeddings executes and generates vectors for all nodes. /semantic_search returns relevant results. Embeddings auto-generated on new node creation. Document embedding model and dimensionality.
